Class BudgetCycle

java.lang.Object
domain.BudgetCycle
public class BudgetCycle extends Object
Represents a user-defined budget cycle with a fixed allowance and date range. Tracks spending progress and exposes derived metrics such as remaining balance and daily spending limit.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private LocalDate
    endDate
    Last day of the budget cycle (inclusive).
    private int
    id
    Unique database identifier for this cycle.
    private LocalDate
    startDate
    First day of the budget cycle (inclusive).
    private CycleStatus
    status
    Current lifecycle status of this cycle.
    private double
    totalAllowance
    Total money allocated for this cycle in EGP.
    private double
    totalSpent
    Running total of all expenses logged in this cycle.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id
      Unique database identifier for this cycle.

    • totalAllowance

      private double totalAllowance
      Total money allocated for this cycle in EGP.

    • startDate

      private LocalDate startDate
      First day of the budget cycle (inclusive).

    • endDate

      private LocalDate endDate
      Last day of the budget cycle (inclusive).

    • status

      private CycleStatus status
      Current lifecycle status of this cycle.

    • totalSpent

      private double totalSpent
      Running total of all expenses logged in this cycle.

  • Constructor Details

    • BudgetCycle

      public BudgetCycle(double totalAllowance, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Creates a new BudgetCycle with status CycleStatus.UNINITIALIZED.
      Parameters:
      totalAllowance - total budget for the cycle in EGP
      startDate - first day of the cycle
      endDate - last day of the cycle

  • Method Details

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the database ID (called after DB insert).
      Parameters:
      id - generated database ID

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(CycleStatus status)
      Updates the lifecycle status of this cycle.
      Parameters:
      status - new CycleStatus

    • setTotalSpent

      public void setTotalSpent(double totalSpent)
      Updates the cached total spent amount.
      Parameters:
      totalSpent - cumulative expenses in EGP

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique cycle ID.
      Returns:
      unique cycle ID

    • getTotalAllowance

      public double getTotalAllowance()
      Returns the total allowance in EGP.
      Returns:
      total allowance in EGP

    • getStartDate

      public LocalDate getStartDate()
      Returns the cycle start date.
      Returns:
      cycle start date

    • getEndDate

      public LocalDate getEndDate()
      Returns the cycle end date.
      Returns:
      cycle end date

    • getStatus

      public CycleStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current cycle status.
      Returns:
      current cycle status

    • getRemainingDays

      public int getRemainingDays()
      Calculates the number of days remaining until the cycle ends.
      Returns:
      days from today to end date; 0 if already past

    • getRemainingBalance

      public double getRemainingBalance()
      Calculates the remaining unspent balance.
      Returns:
      totalAllowance - totalSpent in EGP

    • getSpentPercentage

      public double getSpentPercentage()
      Calculates what percentage of the allowance has been spent.
      Returns:
      percentage from 0 to 100 (may exceed 100 if over-budget)

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Checks whether this cycle is currently active.
      Returns:
      true if status is CycleStatus.ACTIVE
